content.en:
In the blink of an eye.

The time for the earth's hundred-year immortal plan has arrived, and at this time, the human beings on the earth have basically become immortals, as long as there are a few centenarians, who have not become immortals for various reasons, but it does not affect the overall situation.

Although it is a little short of the expected goal, as long as it takes a few more years, when the old people who have not become immortals pass away, the earth will be full of immortals.

However, the Earth Immortal Pilot Program is complete.

Although the plan was completed, Ye Tian still hadn't lifted the blockade, he needed to return to the Supreme Hall of the Terran and wait for the second step of the Terran plan.

"Lord of Darkness, let's go back!"

Ye Tian called.

The Dark Lord appeared in front of Ye Tian and nodded: "Your Highness, then let's go!"

The Dark Lord and Ye Tian set off for the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and as for the ten cosmic gods still guarding here, the ten great god-level and Jinchen True Monarch still remained on the earth.

Soon, Ye Tian returned to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race and met the Kunwu Supreme.

"Meet the Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

When the Kunwu Supreme saw Ye Tian, he nodded with satisfaction: "Yes, in a few days, you will conduct the assessment of the Xuan-level region, enter the Xuan-level region, and become His Highness of the Xuan-level region." "

"Ye Tian understands!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, Ye Tian inquired about the progress of the Immortal Clan's plan.

Kunwu Supreme said: "At present, some pilots have basically succeeded, and many clansmen have transformed into immortal clans, but these numbers are still too small compared to the number of human races. The current second step of the plan is to carry out pilot projects according to forces. For example, in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, all people have been transformed into immortals, and the great forces of the Holy Domain have also been transformed into immortals one by one, and all the humans in some worlds secretly controlled by the major forces have also been transformed into immortals. From the top power of the human race, it will be transformed step by step into a weak force, and finally most of the forces in the human area will be transformed into the immortal race, and then the entire human race will be transformed into the immortal race. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Kunwu Supreme, in this way, it is easy to be exposed, right?"

"There's no way, exposure is certain, after all, it is impossible not to expose the countless humans in the thirty-six domains of the transformed human race. But at present, our Terran race has also made some countermeasures, such as blocking the territory, prohibiting other alien races from entering the human area, and even subordinate races are not allowed to enter the human territory. In addition, we have also used several supreme treasures to monitor the thirty-six domains of the human race. In this way, the risk of exposure can be reduced. Of course, during this period, humans were also forbidden to leave the territory of the Terrans. Even you are not allowed to leave during this time. Kunwu Supreme said.

Ye Tian nodded, feeling that this method was okay.

Immediately, Ye Tian left the Kunwu Hall and returned to Earth.

Then, Ye Tian let the Dark Lord contact the blockade, and reminded the human race on the earth to try not to expose the affairs of the immortal race.

And non-true god-level are not allowed to leave the earth, only true god-level powerhouses can leave the earth and enter the outside world.

This is also to prevent a large number of god-level people on the earth from causing shock to the outside world, which will cause the outside world to peep and cause the affairs of the immortal clan to be exposed.

Judging from Kunwu Supreme's plan, if the other forces in the galaxy want to transform into immortals, they will need to wait for a long time, so they need to keep it secret for the time being.

After dealing with the affairs of the earth, Ye Tian left and will not return for a short time.

As for the safety of the planet, he was less worried.

At present, there are a large number of god-level on the earth, and there are even many true god-level, but the time is limited, so the great god-level has not been born.

But Ye Tian still left ten great god-level and one galaxy-level to stay on the earth, and with the strength of the earth, it was enough to sweep the major forces in the galaxy.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not worried about the safety of the earth at all.

Moreover, several supreme treasures of the human race monitor the thirty-six domains of the human race, and the earth, as one of the pilots, is mainly monitored, if a powerful alien race sneaks here, it will be discovered as soon as possible, and there is no danger problem at all.

So, Ye Tian left the earth with peace of mind.

......

The supreme temple of the Terrans.

Ye Tian returned, first returned to his cultivation tower in Bibo Lake, and immediately said to his housekeeper Ziya: "Ziya, I'm going to enter the Xuan-level area." "

"Wow, the master is about to enter the Xuan-level area, Ziya will pack up her things!"

Ziya looked very excited.

Ye Tian didn't have anything in the cultivation tower, it was basically just some daily necessities and some planted plants, which didn't have much value.

He didn't care, but Ziya, the housekeeper, cared very much, put it all away and took it with him.

The promotion of the yellow-level region to the Xuan-level region needs to be assessed, and even if Ye Tian's strength is recognized by the supremes, it still needs to be assessed, this is the rule!

Xuanmen Pass!

This is a huge ancient stone gate from the yellow-level area to the Xuan-level area, also known as the Xuanmen, and you can only enter the Xuan-level area by passing through the Xuanmen Pass.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, if a god-level wants to break through the Xuanmen Pass, he must have the combat power of an ordinary-level second-grade son of the universe.

But in fact, after many ordinary-level highnesses are promoted to the god level, their combat power will drop by many notches, and it will take a long time to re-cultivate to ordinary highnesses.

After all, it is impossible for an ordinary-level highness who is at the second rank to be promoted to the god level and still be a son of the universe at the second grade of the ordinary level at the god level.

Therefore, for many ordinary-level highnesses, after cultivating at the god level for a long time, it would be good to be able to maintain the rank of the emperor-level highness, and many would even fall down one level.

Under normal circumstances, many highnesses in the yellow-level region would choose to cultivate in the yellow-level area for a long time after becoming a god-level before going to the Xuanmen Pass.

And Ye Tian doesn't need it, his strength has reached a point where many people can't look up to him.

Wow!

Ye Tian stepped into the Xuanmen and soon came to a void.

Here, Ye Tian met a clone of His Highness, who had about the second-grade combat power of an ordinary level Son of the Universe.

Ye Tian easily killed the other party with one knife and broke through the Xuanmen Pass.

Xuan-level area.

Ye Tian stepped on the ground in this area, and Ziya upgraded her authority the moment Ye Tian broke through the Xuanmen Pass, and immediately shuttled over and entered the Xuan-level area.

There is no essential difference between the Xuan-level area and the yellow-level area, and this is just a cultivation area.

"Ziya, let's go, go find a cultivation tower!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Your Highness!"

Ziya hurriedly said.

As for the dark lord dominating them, Ye Tian didn't inform them, but they must have known about it a long time ago.

Once they found a new place to live, they told them that they were fine.

Anyway, Ye Tian usually doesn't see the darkness dominating them, after all, there is too much gap between the levels of the two sides.

Xuan-level area, Xuanhuang Mountain.

This is the area with the strongest vitality in the Xuan-level region, there are a total of thirteen cultivation towers, and now there are already eight cultivation towers that already have owners.

Soon, Ye Tian came to Xuanhuang Mountain.

"Master, the cultivation tower on the top of Xuanhuang Mountain has not been occupied yet, so the master will go and occupy that cultivation tower!" Ziya said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian said.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew to the top of Xuanhuang Mountain, and this scene was known to the guards of various highnesses.

For the first time, several highnesses of Xuanhuang Mountain knew about it and came out one by one.

At first, these highnesses thought that Ye Tian was just a reckless newcomer, vainly trying to get their hands on the cultivation tower on the top of Xuanhuang Mountain, wanting to give this newcomer a little color and teach this newcomer a lesson.

But when they also came to the top of Xuanhuang Mountain and saw Ye Tian, the face of one of His Highnesses changed slightly.

This Highness is the only remaining Constant-level Highness in the Xuan-level region, named His Highness Jun Jian, and the rest of the Constant-level Highnesses have all fallen and died in the last relic world.

The other highnesses didn't know Ye Tian and were about to scold Ye Tian, but they were stopped by His Highness Jun Jian.

"I've seen His Highness Wanfa!"

His Royal Highness Jun Jian said very politely.

"Do you know me?" Ye Tian looked at His Highness Jun Jian and asked.

"I've heard of His Royal Highness Wanfa's name, and it's my honor to have the honor to meet His Highness Wanfa this time!" His Highness Jun Jian said respectfully.

At this time, several other highnesses were dumbfounded.

His Royal Highness Jun Jian is now the leader of all His Highnesses in their Xuan-level region, and he is so polite to a strange new Highness.

"Immortal, I see!"

Ye Tian saw the immortal aura on His Royal Highness Jun Jian's body, and immediately understood.

Obviously, His Royal Highness Jun Jian is also one of the first batch of pilot personnel, so he has some understanding of the Immortal Clan's plan, maybe His Royal Highness Jun Jian is also covered by a big man behind him, plus Ye Tian shines in the ruins world, and his reputation is resounding throughout the universe.

If you really want to inquire, you will definitely be able to inquire.

It's just that the highnesses of the Xuan-level region have come back from the ruins world, and if they don't inquire about the situation carefully, they won't know that the emperor-level highnesses are crushing the universe in the ruins world.

"I'm going to try the assessment of this cultivation tower, I won't tell you!"

Ye Tian turned around and entered this cultivation tower and went to the assessment.

Seeing that Ye Tian was no longer here, one of His Highnesses couldn't help but ask, "Your Highness Jun Jian, why are you so respectful to this new Highness, could it be that he is the heir of a certain high-ranking human race?"

His Royal Highness Jun Jian said with a smile: "You know too little about the news, our Terran Xuan-level region, The earth-level area and the heaven-level area have suffered a lot of losses in the ruins world, and they have not gained much, but the emperor-level area has a lot of big gains, and the emperor-level area has the strength of the invincible-level Henggu-level Highness, and has killed a large number of constant-level highnesses in the ruins world, and even crushed the two invincible-level constant-level highnesses of the gods and demons, and broke through the Ten Tribulations area, breaking the record of the human race, and is called the first emperor-level highness of the universe, and no one can compete with it. No one knows how strong his strength is, don't look at His Highness Wanfa as a newly promoted Xuan-level Highness, but it still far exceeds our strength!"

"What !!!"

Several other Highnesses were completely stunned.

Ye Tian's record is inevitably too fierce, and it is too exaggerated, crushing the invincible Constant-level Constant-level Highness of the Protoss and the Demon Race, this is simply a myth!

At this moment, they were full of awe for Ye Tian!
